tasks.label: kill-port-3000
args: $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { Stop-Process -Id $conn[0].OwningProcess -Force; Write-Output ('killed:' + $conn[0].OwningProcess) } else { Write-Output 'none' }

tasks.label: kill-port-3000-2
args: $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { Stop-Process -Id $conn[0].OwningProcess -Force; Write-Output done } else { Write-Output none }
